title: Add inference quality gate: test provider connectivity after hex inference add and return error if empty response; add --prune flag to hex inference discover to remove failing providers

steps.description: Define ProviderHealthPort interface and PingResult domain model with necessary fields.
steps.done_condition: ProviderHealthPort interface and PingResult model are implemented and pass type checks.

steps.description: Add prune parameter to DiscoverInferenceProvidersUseCase signature.
steps.done_condition: DiscoverInferenceProvidersUseCase updated with prune parameter and passes type checks.

steps.description: Implement health check adapter for OpenAI inference provider following ProviderHealthPort.
steps.done_condition: OpenAI health check adapter is implemented and passes tests.

steps.description: Implement health check adapter for Anthropic inference provider following ProviderHealthPort.
steps.done_condition: Anthropic health check adapter is implemented and passes tests.

steps.description: Modify AddInferenceProviderUseCase to invoke health check and return error on empty/error responses.
steps.done_condition: AddInferenceProviderUseCase updated to handle health checks and return structured errors.

steps.description: Update DiscoverInferenceProvidersUseCase to filter non-responsive providers based on health checks when prune is enabled.
steps.done_condition: DiscoverInferenceProvidersUseCase updated to prune non-responsive providers successfully.

steps.description: Update CLI command for hex inference add to handle health check errors.
steps.done_condition: CLI for hex inference add correctly handles health check errors and provides user feedback.

steps.description: Add --prune flag functionality to hex inference discover CLI command mapped to the use case parameter.
steps.done_condition: Hex inference discover CLI correctly implements --prune flag and displays results appropriately.

steps.description: Wire up the health check implementations to the composition root.
steps.done_condition: Health check adapters are wired up correctly in the composition root.

steps.description: Create integration tests for health checks and connectivity validations.
steps.done_condition: Integration tests for health checks and validations are written and passing.

mergeOrder: P0.1 - ProviderHealthPort and PingResult are completed
P1.1, P1.2 - Health check adapters for OpenAI and Anthropic are implemented
P4.1 - Health check wiring in composition root

riskRegister.mitigation: Optimize health check implementation for speed.
riskRegister.risk: Health checks may add latency to add and discover commands.

riskRegister.mitigation: Implement retry logic for health checks.
riskRegister.risk: Temporary network issues may lead to false negatives when testing provider health.

successCriteria: Health checks are integrated and provide immediate feedback on provider status.
--prune flag works as intended, filtering out non-responsive providers.
